title: Seafarers’ Welfare and Crisis Management Officer (SWACO). The
content: 49 LMAs and foreign principals shall designate or employ at least one (1) regular and trained 50 SWACO in its office to monitor and report the status and condition of the seafarers, 51 including significant incidents onboard. The SWACO shall timely respond to complaints 52 of seafarers and their families, as well as inquiries from the Department. 53 54 The designated SWACO may perform subsidiary functions with the manning agency; 55 provided that the SWACO’s welfare responsibilities remain a priority and are not 56 compromised. 57 58

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
